findings.title: UAE says air defences intercepted two missiles and three drones from Iran
findings.summary:
UAE says air defences intercepted two missiles and three drones from Iran

    
    

        
    
                The United Arab Emirates’ ministry of defence has said its air defence systems intercepted two ballistic missiles and three drones launched from Iran.

Three people were wounded.

findings.title: US and Iran exchange fire, but Trump says ceasefire still in effect
findings.summary:
The United States and Iran exchanged fire on Thursday in the most serious test yet of their month-long ceasefire, but Iran said the situation returned to normal while the US said it did not want to escalate.
The renewed hostilities broke out as Washington was awaiting Iran’s response to a US proposal that would stop the fighting but leave the most contentious issues, such as Iran’s nuclear programme, unresolved for now.
Iran’s military said the US targeted two ships entering the Strait of Hor...

findings.title: 'Too much at stake to accept ignorance': Lawmakers challenge US ambiguity over Israel’s nuclear capability
findings.summary:
WASHINGTON: Nearly 30 Democratic lawmakers have urged US Secretary of State Marco Rubio to end Washington’s longstanding ambiguity over Israel’s alleged nuclear weapons programme, arguing that such secrecy has become untenable during the ongoing war on Iran.
Israel is widely believed to be in possession of nuclear weapons, though it neither acknowledges nor denies having a nuclear arsenal.
In a May 4 letter addressed to Secretary Rubio, the lawmakers said the US was “currently engaged in a wa...

findings.title: ‘Saudi pressure’ led US to pause Hormuz project: NBC
findings.summary:
WASHINGTON: US President Donald Trump’s decision to pause a US operation to escort commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz reportedly followed pressure from Saudi Arabia, according to an NBC News report citing two US officials.
The operation, dubbed Project Freedom, was unexpectedly announced by Trump on social media on Sunday and began on Monday. However, US allies in the Gulf were reportedly surprised by the announcement.
According to the officials, Saudi Arabia — one of Washington’s ...

findings.title: Nuclear ‘Close-Calls’ Prove Deterrence No Guarantee for Peace
findings.summary: The consequences of nuclear warfare would transcend borders and the impact would be felt across generations. Yet knowing this, member states, including nuclear-armed states, are increasingly flouting the nuclear taboo, while also relying heavily on deterrence to prevent fallout. Throughout the Cold War period, there were stories of nuclear “close calls”—moments where the world could […]

findings.title: Iran and U.S. exchange fire in Strait of Hormuz
findings.summary: The U.S. and Iran both conducted attacks in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday, with Iran firing missiles and drones at three U.S. naval vessels and the U.S. striking a range of Iranian targets.Why it matters: A U.S. official told Axios the exchange did not constitute a resumption of the war, but the Iranian military described the U.S. strikes as a ceasefire violation and threatened retaliation.President Trump told ABC News they were "just a love tap."Driving the news: CENTCOM said it struck Ir...

findings.title: Trump downplays threat to Iran ceasefire after exchange of attacks
findings.summary: The US claims that Iranian forces launched the first attacks against American destroyers, while Tehran accuses the US military of violating the truce. Despite this, the US president insists that negotiations are progressing, even as he continues to threaten the Islamic Republic.
findings.text: Trump downplays threat to Iran ceasefire after exchange of attacks | The US claims that Iranian forces launched the first attacks against American destroyers, while Tehran accuses the US military of violating the truce. Despite this, the US president insists that negotiations are progressing, even as he continues to threaten the Islamic Republic.

findings.title: Iran-Liveblog: ++ Iran meldet Beschlagnahmung von Öltanker ++
findings.summary: Iran hat die Beschlagnahmung eines unter der Flagge von Barbados fahrenden Öltankers in der Straße von Hormus gemeldet. Trotz der neuen Angriffe zwischen Iran und den USA ist die Waffenruhe für US-Präsident Trump noch in Kraft.
findings.text: Iran-Liveblog: ++ Iran meldet Beschlagnahmung von Öltanker ++ | Iran hat die Beschlagnahmung eines unter der Flagge von Barbados fahrenden Öltankers in der Straße von Hormus gemeldet. Trotz der neuen Angriffe zwischen Iran und den USA ist die Waffenruhe für US-Präsident Trump noch in Kraft.

findings.title: USA und Iran beschießen sich in Straße von Hormus
findings.summary: Trotz Waffenruhe haben sich die USA und Iran in der Straße von Hormus gegenseitig attackiert. Die US-Seite strebt nach eigenen Angaben keine Eskalation an. Das Regime in Teheran sieht das anders.

findings.title: Трамп заявил, что перемирие с Ираном остается в силе. Взаимные удары он назвал «любовным похлопыванием»
findings.summary: Перемирие с Ираном остается в силе. Об этом в комментарии ABC News заявил президент США Дональд Трамп.

findings.title: США ударили по иранскому порту Кешм и городу Бендер-Аббас (но не считают это возобновлением войны). Иран атаковал американские военные корабли
findings.summary: Военные США нанесли удары по иранскому порту на острове Кешм и городу Бендер-Аббас, сообщила журналист телеканала Fox News Дженнифер Гриффин со ссылкой на источник. Об ударах США «по иранским целям в районе Ормузского пролива» также сообщил корреспондент Axios Барак Равид.
findings.text: США ударили по иранскому порту Кешм и городу Бендер-Аббас (но не считают это возобновлением войны). Иран атаковал американские военные корабли | Военные США нанесли удары по иранскому порту на острове Кешм и городу Бендер-Аббас, сообщила журналист телеканала Fox News Дженнифер Гриффин со ссылкой на источник. findings.title: US launches new strikes on Iran, though Trump claims ceasefire still holds
findings.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump told ABC News that the strikes against Iran were "just a love tap" and that the ceasefire remains in effect.

findings.title: La guerra contra Irán agiganta la hegemonía de Estados Unidos en petróleo y gas
findings.summary: Las ventas de crudo, en máximos históricos, convierten al país norteamericano en exportador neto por primera vez desde la II Guerra Mundial

findings.title: Son dakika... Körfez ülkelerinden İran'a karşı yeni hamle: İntikam talebinde geri adım... Trump: Anlaşma olmazsa sert vuracağız
findings.summary: Körfez ülkeleri, İran’a karşı BM’de sert yaptırımlar ve güvenlik önlemleri içeren yeni bir karar taslağı için harekete geçti. Taslak metinden, askeri müdahalenin önünü açabilecek BM Şartı’nın “7. Bölümü”ne yapılan atıfların çıkarılması dikkat çekti. Öte yandan ABD Başkanı Donald Trump ise İran'ın müzakere fırsatını tekrar bulamayacağını öne sürdü ve "anlaşma olmazsa sert vuracağız" sözleriyle Tahran'ı tehdit etti.
findings.text: Son dakika... Körfez ülkelerinden İran'a karşı yeni hamle: İntikam talebinde geri adım... Trump: Anlaşma olmazsa sert vuracağız | Körfez ülkeleri, İran’a karşı BM’de sert yaptırımlar ve güvenlik önlemleri içeren yeni bir karar taslağı için harekete geçti. Taslak metinden, askeri müdahalenin önünü açabilecek BM Şartı’nın “7. Bölümü”ne yapılan atıfların çıkarılması dikkat çekti. Öte yandan ABD Başkanı Donald Trump ise İran'ın müzakere fırsatını tekrar bulamayacağını öne sürdü ve "anlaşma olmazsa sert vuracağız" sözleriyle Tahran'ı tehdit etti.

findings.title: US and Iran trade fire, threatening fragile truce
findings.summary:
US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran was still in place despite an Iranian attack on three American destroyers in the Strait of Hormuz that fanned fears Friday that the truce was faltering.
The post US and Iran trade fire, threatening fragile truce appeared first on Vanguard News.
findings.text:
US and Iran trade fire, threatening fragile truce | US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran was still in place despite an Iranian attack on three American destroyers in the Strait of Hormuz that fanned fears Friday that the truce was faltering.
The post US and Iran trade fire, threatening fragile truce appeared first on Vanguard News.

findings.title: Iran war marks the end of American primacy as we know it
findings.summary: The war in Ukraine shattered a core assumption about great-power dominance: that size and military strength are enough to impose one’s will. Ukraine showed otherwise. With the right strategy, geography, and resolve, a weaker state can survive and blunt - and in key respects even defeat - a much stronger adversary.The United States now faces an uncomfortable parallel. The war with Iran is exposing similar limits to American power.For decades, U.S. grand strategy has rested on primacy — the bel...
findings.text: Iran war marks the end of American primacy as we know it | The war in Ukraine shattered a core assumption about great-power dominance: that size and military strength are enough to impose one’s will. Ukraine showed otherwise. With the right strategy, geography, and resolve, a weaker state can survive and blunt - and in key respects even defeat - a much stronger adversary.The United States now faces an uncomfortable parallel. The war with Iran is exposing similar limits to American power.For decades, U.S. grand strategy has rested on primacy — the bel...

findings.title: Expert: Iran war cost $72 billion over first two months
findings.summary: A new report finds the Iran war has cost the U.S. nearly $72 billion in its first 60 days — about $1.2 billion per day. Stephen Semler, journalist and co-founder of the Security Policy Reform Institute, produced the new estimate for the Popular Information newsletter. His $71.8 billion total accounts for the cost of operations, weapons, and U.S. subsidies for Israel’s bombs and interceptors. And it includes the roughly $11.9 billion in military assets lost or damaged during the war.  Image cr...

His $71.8 billion total accounts for the cost of operations, weapons, and U.S. subsidies for Israel’s bombs and interceptors. findings.title: [EN DIRECT] Après un regain de tension cette nuit, l'Iran et les États-Unis continuent à privilégier la voie diplomatique
findings.summary: L'armée américaine affirme avoir frappé l'Iran après une attaque contre plusieurs de ses navires. De son côté, l'Iran dit avoir tiré des missiles ce jeudi 7 mai « après l'attaque d'un pétrolier iranien par l'armée américaine » et accuse les États-Unis d'avoir brisé le cessez-le-feu. Ce vendredi matin, la défense aérienne des Émirats arabes unis est en action face à des drones et missiles tirés depuis l'Iran, a annoncé son ministère de la Défense.
findings.text: [EN DIRECT] Après un regain de tension cette nuit, l'Iran et les États-Unis continuent à privilégier la voie diplomatique | L'armée américaine affirme avoir frappé l'Iran après une attaque contre plusieurs de ses navires. De son côté, l'Iran dit avoir tiré des missiles ce jeudi 7 mai « après l'attaque d'un pétrolier iranien par l'armée américaine » et accuse les États-Unis d'avoir brisé le cessez-le-feu. Ce vendredi matin, la défense aérienne des Émirats arabes unis est en action face à des drones et missiles tirés depuis l'Iran, a annoncé son ministère de la Défense.
